subject: docs(claude): align CLAUDE.md with glow-props fleet standard
body:
Bring CLAUDE.md into structural parity with glow-props while preserving
tool-till-tees-specific content (Project Overview, Tech Stack, Architecture,
Env Vars, project AI Notes). Added Communication section, Timer and
Subscription Cleanup subsection, Implementation Patterns section pointing to
glow-props as source of truth, and the 48-trigger grouped system with meta
sweeps + reflective passes. Removed HISTORY.md doc and inline PWA/Debug
specs (now fetched from glow-props docs/implementations/).

Tags: documentation, alignment, claude-md, fleet
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
